name: IRSF-003a: AED Treatment Sequencing in Seizure Patients
description: Treatment pathway analysis of anticonvulsant medication sequences in all AED-treated Rett syndrome patients (cohort 200, N=484). Traces the temporal order of 7 most common AEDs: Keppra, Diastat, Lamictal, Trileptal, Clonazepam, Depakote, Topamax. Concurrent starts within 30 days grouped as combination therapy. Reveals most common first-line, second-line, and third-line AED choices. First empirical treatment pathway study in Rett syndrome.
